attributes.description: Alerts when the WiredTiger cache miss rate rises. Low cache hit ratios mean reads are going to disk.
attributes.name: [MongoDB OTel] High cache miss rate

investigation_guide.blob:
## MongoDB high cache miss rate

### What fired
Per-server cache miss rate rose above the computed threshold.

### Why it matters
WiredTiger's internal cache is the main performance buffer. Rising miss rate means working set has exceeded cache or cache has been evicted — reads slow dramatically.

### Triage
1. Check cache sizing.
2. Look at recent workload changes.

### Remediation
- Add memory / raise `wiredTigerCacheSizeGB`.
- Tune queries / indexes to reduce scanned data.

### Tuning
- Fires on relative miss rate growth; thresholds tune in the query.

esqlQuery.esql:
TS metrics-mongodbreceiver.otel-default
// Scope to MongoDB OTel metrics
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "mongodbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.mongodb.cache.operations IS NOT NULL
// Split hit vs miss for cache operations (counter); both branches output same schema
| FORK (
    WHERE attributes.type == "hit"
    | STATS hits = SUM(RATE(metrics.mongodb.cache.operations)) BY resource.attributes.server.address
    | EVAL server = resource.attributes.server.address, misses = 0.0
  )
  (
    WHERE attributes.type == "miss"
    | STATS misses = SUM(RATE(metrics.mongodb.cache.operations)) BY resource.attributes.server.address
    | EVAL server = resource.attributes.server.address, hits = 0.0
  )
| STATS hits = SUM(hits), misses = SUM(misses) BY server
| WHERE hits IS NOT NULL AND misses IS NOT NULL AND (hits + misses) > 0
| EVAL miss_rate = ROUND(misses / (hits + misses) * 100.0, 2)
// Alert when cache miss rate exceeds 5% (working set may exceed WiredTiger cache)
| WHERE miss_rate > 5.0
| SORT miss_rate DESC
| LIMIT 20
